title: T.J. McFarland Announces Retirement
description: After over a decade in the big leagues, T.J. McFarland is hanging up his spikes. The left-hander announced his retirement on Instagram today, thanking his wife, parents, family, friends, teammates and the clubs who employed him for all their support throughout his time as a professional ballplayer.

title: Mets prospect Carson Benge makes Opening Day roster: ‘He earned it’
description: PORT ST. LUCIE — It’s the time of the year when baseball is dominated by feel-good stories. The Mets are feeling especially good about their player development department as they break camp to begin the 2026 season, with 2024 first-round draft pick Carson Benge set to play right field Thursday at Citi Field when they host the Pittsburgh Pirates on Opening Day. “It’s a moment he’ll never ...

title: Gujarat Makes Significant Progress in TB Eradication Efforts, Achieves 94% Treatment Targets
description: Gujarat is moving closer to Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s vision of a Tuberculosis-Free India, having achieved 94 percent of the TB registration and treatment goals outlined by NITI Aayog. Under the leadership of Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel, the state has reached notable milestones in its fight against this infectious disease, as detailed in a recent [...] The post Gujarat Makes Significant Progress in TB Eradication Efforts, Achieves 94% Treatment Targets appeared first on The CSR Journal .

title: Iron Ring – Every Engineer In Canada Wears A Ring Because Someone Screwed Up The Math “The Ritual of the Calling of an Engineer”
description: Every engineer in Canada walks out of school wearing a reminder that people died because someone got the math wrong. It’s called the Iron Ring, and if you look closely, you’ll see a plain metal band, with no engraving or school logo. It’s worn on the pinky of your working hand, and drags across every [...]

title: Elliot, Bend take home top honours at BCA Awards
description: Keila Elliot and Marradon Bend clinched two of the top individual honours when the Barbados Cricket Association (BCA) held their awards ceremony, at the Hilton Barbados Resort on Saturday. ... The post Elliot, Bend take home top honours at BCA Awards appeared first on Barbados Today .

title: IRGC's chilling footage exposes rows of ballistic beasts nose-to-tail as Trump takes shocking u-turn
description: A dramatic new video from Iran has sent shockwaves across the geopolitical landscape, revealing a vast underground missile facility packed with long-range weapons. The footage, described as just the “tip of the iceberg,” surfaced just as tensions peaked over U.S. threats to strike Iran’s power infrastructure. As Iran issued chilling warnings of retaliation targeting regional energy assets, Washington signalled a sudden pause for talks. With both sides shifting between escalation and diplomacy, the revelation of hidden missile stockpiles raises a critical question: how prepared is the world for a prolonged and unpredictable conflict?

title: Former Democratic mayor of Binghamton plans to run for Broome County Sheriff
description: Former Binghamton mayor Matthew Ryan ‘82 recently announced plans to run for Broome County Sheriff, challenging incumbent Sheriff Fred Akshar. In a March 12 call with WNBF Radio, Ryan said he was in the process of collecting signatures in preparation for his announcement. Candidates running on a major party ballot line need a minimum of...

title: Iran war ‘could go on for some time’ says Keir Starmer
description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer has told MPs that the UK should be prepared for the Iran war to carry on "for some time", stressing that he didn't want Britain to be dragged into it.
